description_long: This object is a decorative wooden candle arch, featuring a symmetrical arrangement of ten red candles with small golden holders, five on each side. The base and arch are intricately cut from light-colored wood, forming silhouettes of two human figures, two Christmas trees, and a central heart motif, all under a stylized archway. The candles are evenly spaced along the top of the arch, each with a visible flame, suggesting they are lit. The wooden structure is flat and sturdy, designed to rest securely on a horizontal surface. The overall design is festive and traditional, reminiscent of holiday or Christmas window decorations commonly seen in European towns. The craftsmanship highlights both the natural wood grain and the fine details of the cut-out figures.
description: A festive wooden candle arch with ten red candles, golden holders, and intricate cut-out figures of people, trees, and a heart under an archway. The object is designed for tabletop display and emits a warm, decorative glow.
description_view_0: Front view showing all ten lit candles, detailed wooden cut-outs of two people, two trees, and a heart under an arch.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the arch, with candles aligned in a straight row and minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same cut-out figures and candle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the row of candles and the slim wooden structure visible.
attribute_holder_type: wooden arch with small golden metal holders
